title: gnome-shell and gsettings-desktop-schemas bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
gnome-shell
[47.4-3]
- Allow restart/shutdown on lock screen

gsettings-desktop-schemas
[47.1-3]
- Rebuild for the correct RHEL target

[47.1-2]
- Add an option to enable restart/shutdown at lockscreen
full_text:
gnome-shell
[47.4-3]
- Allow restart/shutdown on lock screen

gsettings-desktop-schemas
[47.1-3]
- Rebuild for the correct RHEL target

[47.1-2]
- Add an option to enable restart/shutdown at lockscreen

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-16445.html
